summary: The Tiger King, a powerful and skilled warrior, is reflecting on his past conquests and the people who have stood in his way. He recalls meeting someone who possessed great power, which he was able to surpass after years of training under their guidance. Despite having built a massive army and achieving incredible feats, he now faces a new challenge from an arrogant human who shares similar ideals. The Tiger King is determined to overcome this obstacle and prove his strength once again.
key_moments: The Tiger King meets someone with great power and decides to surpass them after years of training
He builds a massive army and achieves incredible feats, but still faces opposition from others
A new challenger emerges, an arrogant human who shares similar ideals
